blockingIssues.description: The execution-plan coverage fix added dedicated treatment for the previously omitted stages, but `pe-terminal-open` still allows a private audit report merely provided to BETTER, so the proof gate is not consistently externally observable/investor-verifiable under VAL-ROADMAP-016.

The enterprise-data proof gate still hinges on a private signed agreement and documented API usage over 30 days, which remains an internal/private criterion rather than an externally observable proof surface under VAL-ROADMAP-016.

The visual parity follow-up added low-cost constrained motion and committed tradebetter comparison evidence, but the recorded validation still never measures runtime smoothness on the actual enhanced desktop motion stack; the desktop evidence remained in `data-visual-state=fallback` / `data-motion-layers=0`, so the runtime-smoothness half of VAL-VISUAL-025 is still unproven.

appliedUpdates.description: Extended `.factory/library/testing.md` with the headless-WebGL limitation observed during VAL-VISUAL-025 rerun work: fallback-state checks can run headless, but enhanced-path runtime smoothness evidence needs a headed/GPU-capable browser session.

Extended `.factory/library/content-model.md` to note that `SourceCue.note` is not currently rendered by `EvidenceHook`, so data-only note edits will not change visible evidence-hook copy without a component change.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: When a procedure requires reading `.factory/library/*.md` (or `design-system.md` for shell/landing changes), require transcript-visible reads or an explicit deviation; otherwise workers should not report `followedProcedure=true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun reviews for `investor-graph-workspace-graph-first-landing-and-valuation-gate-fix` and `investor-roadmap-execution-plan-coverage-and-proof-gate-observability-fix` both found missing transcript-visible library/design-system reads before implementation while the handoffs still reported `followedProcedure=true`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define which visible roadmap nodes count as `primary roadmap stages` for VAL-ROADMAP-016 so workers do not keep inventing local heuristics for execution-plan coverage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original execution-plan feature omitted visible planned stages, and the fix now encodes its own rule in `src/content/__tests__/execution-plans.test.ts` that every visible non-live/non-speculative roadmap node is primary, but that convention is still not documented in mission shared state.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make the headless WebGL fallback limitation explicit and require a headed/GPU-capable browser session whenever a contract calls for enhanced-path motion evidence or runtime smoothness observations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The rerun for `investor-visual-parity-mobile-motion-and-evidence-gaps-fix` captured desktop fallback timings only because the browser session remained in `data-visual-state=fallback` / `data-motion-layers=0` under a headless WebGL limitation, leaving the enhanced-path runtime-smoothness requirement unresolved.
